title: The Tango of the Widower and Its Distorting Mirror
original_title: El tango del viudo y su espejo deformante
overview: A man's wife commits suicide and  appears to him as a ghost. The ghost follows him everywhere – under the bed, under tables… After seeing the ghost so frequently, the man begins to resemble her.
